export_result.sh explicitly hardcodes this file path to extract results.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Hubble Space Telescope FITS data of the Eagle Nebula from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator datasets. The required output CSV path is verified as '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/roi_measurements.csv', and the output text file for the excitation ratio must be at '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/excitation_ratio.txt', both hardcoded in the export script. The minimum area for the region of interest is confirmed to be 20000 pixels based on the verifier scoring logic.
